# DexEarth AI Instructions

- **Architecture**: Single-page React 19 + CesiumJS globe; no backend. HUD overlays globe container. Dev-only proxies live in Vite middleware; production build lacks them.
- **Key code map**: App boot + layer lifecycle in [src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx); layer definitions in [src/config.js](src/config.js); shared math/helpers in [src/utils.js](src/utils.js) and [src/utils/geo.js](src/utils/geo.js); time engine in [src/state/timeController.js](src/state/timeController.js); dataset cache TTL/pinning in [src/storage/cache.js](src/storage/cache.js); Phase II UI shell in [src/ui/PhaseIIRoot.jsx](src/ui/PhaseIIRoot.jsx) with panel modules under [src/ui/panels](src/ui/panels).
- **Dev commands**: `npm run dev` for HMR proxy server (use this, not preview). `npm run test:run` for CI-style vitest pass, `npm run test` watch, `npm run lint`, `npm run format`, `npm run ci` (lint+format:check+test:run+build). Env check via `bash scripts/verify_env.sh`.
- **Data/proxy rules**: `/proxy/flights`, `/proxy/tle`, `/proxy/cables`, `/proxy/coastlines` only exist in dev (see [vite.config.js](vite.config.js)). Thermal fires needs `VITE_FIRMS_MAP_KEY`; otherwise layer marks error but app still runs.
- **Cesium init**: Viewer created once in [src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx) guarded by `viewerRef.current`. Uses ESRI UrlTemplate imagery, disables default base layer, adds bloom. HMR can black-screen Cesium; hard-refresh (`Cmd+Shift+R`) is expected recovery.
- **Layer pattern**: Each layer has symmetric `activateLayer`/`deactivateLayer` cases in [src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx). Primitives live in `layerDataRef` (not React state). Telemetry/status updates via `setTelemetry`/`setLayerStatus`; periodic work scheduled through [src/diagnostics/tickCoordinator.js](src/diagnostics/tickCoordinator.js).
- **Polyline depth look**: Many lines render doubled collections (shadow at ~800m, glow at ~12â€“20km) for parallax; follow this when adding line layers (see maritime/tectonic/seismic cases in [src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx)).
- **Time engine**: All temporal features depend on [src/state/timeController.js](src/state/timeController.js) LIVE/MANUAL/REPLAY modes. Replay runs via `requestAnimationFrame`; manual stepping calls `step(offsetMs)` which auto-switches to MANUAL.
- **Dataset caching**: Use [src/storage/cache.js](src/storage/cache.js) `getOrFetchDataset` for data pullsâ€”fallback chain is Custom Pin â†’ Cache â†’ Bundled â†’ Remote â†’ Fallbacks â†’ Stale cache, with audit logging. Bundled GeoJSON lives in `public/data/*` and `src/data/datasetRegistry.js` defines TTLs and endpoints.
- **Satellite layer reference**: [src/layers/satellites/layer.js](src/layers/satellites/layer.js) shows registry-compatible layer API (`activate/deactivate/tick/applyDegradation`) and how telemetry/status callbacks are wired. Ground tracks are optional and throttled; respect `degradation` caps for Safe Mode.
- **UI panels**: Phase II panels are independent modules under [src/ui/panels/PhaseII](src/ui/panels/PhaseII) and consume the corresponding layer APIs. Keep panel logic UI-only; Cesium primitives belong in layer modules.
- **Overlays system**: Country borders/labels are bundled and preindexed; rebuild `public/data/borders/country_index.json` via `node scripts/generate_country_index.js` when changing border data. Overlay loaders live in [src/overlays/countries](src/overlays/countries).
- **Persistence**: IndexedDB wrappers in [src/storage/db.js](src/storage/db.js) store cache, markers, geofences, alert logs. Markers and alerts survive refresh; respect their schemas when changing.
- **Performance/Safe Mode**: FPS monitored in [src/diagnostics/perfMonitor.js](src/diagnostics/perfMonitor.js); Safe Mode toggles reduce satellite caps and disable heavy post-processing. Avoid adding expensive Cesium primitives without gating behind Safe Mode or caps.
- **Hot reload gotchas**: React StrictMode is intentionally off in [src/main.jsx](src/main.jsx) to avoid double Cesium init. After large edits, a full page reload is acceptable to restore WebGL context.
- **Adding a new layer**: Extend `LAYER_DEFS`, seed initial data in `buildInitialLayerData` (App.jsx), add activate/deactivate cases, and (if networked) proxy the endpoint in Vite. Store Cesium objects on `layerDataRef`, not React state, and register ticks via `tickCoordinator`.
- **Tests**: Unit tests live in [src/__tests__](src/__tests__). Prefer adding math/logic tests (terminator, geo, cache, time controller) in Vitest; Cesium primitives are not unit-tested.
- **Production gap**: Shipping build (`npm run build`) omits proxies; any new remote data must be reachable directly or via an external service (Cloudflare Worker, etc.). Document new proxy needs in README/docs.
